channel.title: Blissed Skin Blog — Skincare Science & Expert Advice
channel.description: Expert articles on skincare science, acne treatment, and skin barrier health from the Blissed Skin science team.

item.title: Skin Barrier Science: Dry vs. Dehydrated Diagnosis
item.description: Learn the biological difference between lipid deficiency and water loss. Clinical protocols for barrier repair based on ISDIN and Hashizume research.

item.title: Circadian Skincare: Optimizing Routine Architecture
item.description: Learn how to align your skincare routine with biological circadian rhythms for maximum ingredient absorption and skin repair.

item.title: The Microcomedone as an Immunological Organ: 2026 Update
item.description: Discover how IL-1α triggers acne 8 weeks before it's visible and the immunological cascade behind microcomedone development.

item.title: Decoding C. acnes IA1: The Transcriptomic Future of Acne Care
item.description: Explore how the C. acnes IA1 filotype triggers inflammatory hub genes and what transcriptomic research means for acne treatment.
